title: Knowledge Science
text:
Knowledge Science is a course website for lectures, workshops, assignments, and applied projects in Knowledge Mining.
The course introduces students to the theory and practice of extracting, organizing, evaluating, and applying knowledge from structured and unstructured data. Topics include statistical learning, text mining, natural language processing, large language models, retrieval-augmented generation, hallucination detection, and agentic AI systems.

title: Knowledge Science
text:
Topics:
Introduction
How to Read Data Science Books
Use of AI
Machine Learning Recap
Ten Simple Rules in AI coding
LLM, Reasoning and Agentic AI
RAG Pipeline
Evaluating AI Systems
